modules.module_title: Components of a Solar PV System

questions.question: Solar energy kya hai?

options.A: Wind se generate hone wali energy
options.B: Sunlight se milne wali energy
options.D: Fossil fuels se milne wali energy

questions.explanation: Solar energy सूरज की रोशनी से मिलने वाली ऊर्जा है, jise electricity mein convert kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Solar energy ke kya benefits hain?

options.B: Limited resource hai
options.C: Renewable aur clean energy source hai

questions.explanation: Solar energy ek renewable aur clean energy source hai, jisse pollution kam hota hai.

questions.question: Ek solar technician ke liye sabse important safety equipment kya hai?

options.B: Sunscreen

questions.explanation: PPE (Personal Protective Equipment) jaise safety helmet, gloves, safety shoes solar technician ke liye bahut zaroori hain.

questions.question: Solar panel install karte samay kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.A: Kisi bhi wire ko touch kar sakte hain
options.B: Wet conditions mein bhi kaam kar sakte hain
options.C: Proper earthing aur insulation check karna chahiye
options.D: No need to turn off the main power

questions.explanation: Electrical shock se bachne ke liye proper earthing aur insulation check karna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Solar PV system mein 'PV' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Photo Voltaic

questions.explanation: PV ka matlab Photo Voltaic hai, jo light ko electricity mein convert karne ki process hai.

questions.question: Kaun sa tool electrical connections check karne ke liye use hota hai?

options.B: Screwdriver

questions.explanation: Multimeter se voltage, current aur resistance ko check kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Roof par kaam karte samay kis safety equipment ka use karna chahiye?

options.B: Sunglasses

questions.explanation: Height par kaam karte samay fall protection ke liye safety harness ka use karna chahiye.

questions.question: Solar panels ko install karte samay kis cheez ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye taaki maximum efficiency mile?

options.A: Kisi bhi direction mein laga sakte hain
options.B: South direction mein tilt angle ke saath
options.C: North direction mein bina tilt ke
options.D: Shaam ke samay install karna chahiye

questions.explanation: India mein solar panels ko South direction mein ek optimal tilt angle ke saath lagana chahiye taaki maximum sunlight mil sake.

questions.question: Agar solar system mein आग lag jaye, toh kaun sa fire extinguisher use karna chahiye?

options.B: Foam based

questions.explanation: Electrical fires (Class C) ke liye CO2 ya Dry Chemical fire extinguisher use karna chahiye, water se shock lag sakta hai.

questions.question: Solar energy ko electricity mein convert karne ke liye kis device ka use hota hai?

options.B: Hydroelectric generator

questions.explanation: Solar panels (PV modules) sunlight ko direct current (DC) electricity mein convert karte hain.

questions.question: Solar system installation ke dauraan electrical hazards ko kaise minimize kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Power off na karein

questions.explanation: Insulated tools ka use karne se electrical shock ka khatra kam ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Solar energy ka primary source kya hai?

options.B: Moon

questions.explanation: Solar energy ka primary source suraj hai, jo heat aur light energy provide karta hai.

questions.question: Kon sa safety practice 'Lockout/Tagout' procedure se related hai?

options.B: Equipment ko accidentally start hone se rokna

questions.explanation: Lockout/Tagout (LOTO) ek safety procedure hai jisme dangerous machinery ko disconnect karke lock kiya jaata hai taaki accidentally start na ho sake.

questions.question: Solar thermal system kis kaam aata hai?

options.B: Paani garam karne ke liye
options.D: Vehicles ko power dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Solar thermal systems suraj ki garmi ka use paani garam karne ya spaces ko heat karne ke liye karte hain, electricity generate karne ke liye nahi.

questions.question: Solar panel ko handle karte samay kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Akele utha lena chahiye
options.C: Glass surface ko scratch hone se bachana chahiye

questions.explanation: Solar panels ki glass surface fragile hoti hai, use scratch ya damage hone se bachana chahiye taaki efficiency bani rahe.

questions.question: Ek solar technician ko heights par kaam karne se pehle kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Ladder ya scaffolding ki stability

questions.explanation: Heights par kaam karne se pehle ladder ya scaffolding ki stability check karna bahut zaroori hai fall accidents se bachne ke liye.

questions.question: Solar energy generation mein 'grid-tied' system ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: System public utility grid se connected hota hai
options.C: System sirf raat mein kaam karta hai
options.D: System ko internet ki zaroorat hoti hai

questions.explanation: Grid-tied system woh hota hai jo public electricity grid se connect hota hai, jisse extra electricity grid ko di ja sakti hai aur kam hone par grid se li ja sakti hai.

questions.question: Voltage ki unit kya hai?

options.B: Ohm (Ω)

questions.explanation: Voltage ki unit Volt (V) hoti hai, jo electrical potential difference ko measure karti hai.

questions.question: Current ki unit kya hai?

options.B: Ampere (A)

questions.explanation: Current ki unit Ampere (A) hoti hai, jo electrical charge ke flow rate ko measure karti hai.

questions.question: Resistance ki unit kya hai?

options.B: Ampere (A)

questions.explanation: Resistance ki unit Ohm (Ω) hoti hai, jo electrical current ke flow mein opposition ko measure karti hai.

questions.question: Ohm's Law ka formula kya hai?

options.B: V = I * R

questions.explanation: Ohm's Law ka formula V = I * R hai, jahan V Voltage, I Current aur R Resistance hai.

questions.question: AC (Alternating Current) aur DC (Direct Current) mein kya difference hai?

options.A: AC sirf batteries mein hota hai
options.B: DC apni direction change karta hai
options.C: AC periodic direction change karta hai, DC ek hi direction mein flow karta hai
options.D: AC sirf low voltage devices mein use hota hai

questions.explanation: AC current periodically apni direction change karta hai, jabki DC current ek hi direction mein flow karta hai.

questions.question: Solar panels kya type ki current generate karte hain?

options.B: DC (Direct Current)

questions.explanation: Solar panels direct current (DC) generate karte hain, jise inverter AC mein convert karta hai.

questions.question: Agar do batteries series mein connect kiye jayen, toh kya badhega?

options.B: Voltage

questions.explanation: Series connection mein voltages add ho jaate hain, jabki current same rehta hai.

questions.question: Agar do batteries parallel mein connect kiye jayen, toh kya badhega?

options.B: Resistance

questions.explanation: Parallel connection mein current capacity (Ah) add ho jaati hai, jabki voltage same rehta hai.

questions.question: Power ki unit kya hai?

options.B: Watt (W)

questions.explanation: Power ki unit Watt (W) hoti hai, jo energy consumption ya generation rate ko measure karti hai.

questions.question: Ek multimeter ka main use kya hai?

options.B: Distance measure karna
options.C: Voltage, current aur resistance measure karna

questions.explanation: Multimeter ek essential tool hai electrical parameters jaise voltage, current aur resistance ko measure karne ke liye.

questions.question: Earthing (grounding) ka kya purpose hai electrical systems mein?

options.B: Electrical shocks se protection provide karna

questions.explanation: Earthing electrical faults ki wajah se hone wale electrical shocks se insaanon aur equipment ko protect karta hai.

questions.question: Agar ek wire ka resistance kam hai, toh usmein current flow kaisa hoga?

options.B: Kam current flow hoga

questions.explanation: Ohm's Law (I = V/R) ke mutabik, agar resistance kam hoga toh current zyada flow hoga, assuming voltage is constant.

questions.question: Inverter ka kya kaam hai solar PV system mein?

options.B: DC power ko AC power mein convert karna

questions.explanation: Inverter solar panels se generate hone wali DC electricity ko gharon aur appliances mein use hone wali AC electricity mein convert karta hai.

questions.question: Fuse ya Circuit Breaker ka kya role hai electrical circuit mein?

options.B: Current limit karna
options.C: Circuit ko overload ya short circuit se protect karna

questions.explanation: Fuse ya Circuit Breaker circuit ko overload ya short circuit hone par automatically break kar dete hain, jisse damage se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Ek solar panel ka open circuit voltage (Voc) kya darshata hai?

options.A: Maximum current jo panel produce kar sakta hai
options.B: Voltage jab panel load se connected na ho
options.C: Voltage jab panel short circuit ho
options.D: Power jo panel generate karta hai

questions.explanation: Open circuit voltage (Voc) woh maximum voltage hai jo solar panel produce kar sakta hai jab us par koi load connect na ho.

questions.question: Solar PV system mein MC4 connector ka kya use hai?

options.A: Solar panels ko roof se attach karna
options.B: Waterproofing ke liye
options.C: Solar panels ko securely aur reliably connect karna

questions.explanation: MC4 connectors solar panels ko aapas mein aur inverter se securely aur reliably connect karne ke liye use hote hain, waterproof connection provide karte hain.

questions.question: Agar ek wire bahut lamba hai, toh uska resistance kaisa hoga?

options.B: Zyada hoga

questions.explanation: Wire ka resistance uski length ke directly proportional hota hai, matlab lamba wire zyada resistance offer karega.

questions.question: Solar PV module kis material se bana hota hai?

options.B: Wood

questions.explanation: Solar PV modules typically silicon se bane hote hain, jo ek semiconductor material hai.

questions.question: Inverter ka primary function kya hai solar system mein?

options.B: DC ko AC mein convert karna

questions.explanation: Inverter DC electricity ko AC electricity mein convert karta hai, jo gharon aur appliances mein use hoti hai.

questions.question: Off-grid solar system mein kaun sa component electricity store karta hai?

options.B: Solar panel

questions.explanation: Off-grid systems mein electricity store karne ke liye battery bank ka use hota hai, taaki raat mein ya badal hone par bhi power mil sake.

questions.question: Charge controller ka kya role hai solar system mein?

options.A: AC ko DC mein convert karna
options.B: Battery ko overcharge ya deep discharge se bachana

questions.explanation: Charge controller battery ko overcharge hone se bachata hai, jisse battery ki life badhti hai.

questions.question: Solar panel ke upar ki transparent layer kya hoti hai?

options.B: Tempered glass

questions.explanation: Solar panel ke upar tempered glass ki layer hoti hai jo cells ko protect karti hai aur sunlight ko pass hone deti hai.

questions.question: Grid-tied solar system mein generally kis component ki zaroorat nahi hoti?

options.B: Inverter

questions.explanation: Grid-tied systems mein electricity storage ke liye batteries ki zaroorat nahi hoti kyuki extra power grid ko di jaati hai aur zaroorat padne par grid se li jaati hai.

questions.question: Solar panel ke do main types kaun se hain?

options.B: Monocrystalline aur Polycrystalline

questions.explanation: Monocrystalline aur Polycrystalline silicon cells solar panels ke do common types hain, jinmein efficiency aur cost mein difference hota hai.

questions.question: String inverter kya hota hai?

options.A: Har panel ke saath ek inverter
options.B: Multiple solar panels ki series (string) ko handle karne wala ek inverter
options.C: Battery ke saath use hone wala inverter

questions.explanation: String inverter ek single unit hota hai jo multiple solar panels ko series mein connect karke unki DC output ko AC mein convert karta hai.

questions.question: Microinverter ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Har panel ki performance individually optimize karta hai
options.C: Badi installations ke liye best hai

questions.explanation: Microinverters har individual solar panel ke piche lagte hain, jisse har panel ki performance optimize hoti hai aur shading ka impact kam hota hai.

questions.question: Solar cables kis type ke hone chahiye?

options.B: UV resistant aur weather resistant

questions.explanation: Solar cables ko outdoor conditions mein extreme UV radiation aur weather changes ko jhelne ke liye UV resistant aur weather resistant hona chahiye.

questions.question: Junction Box (JB) ka kya purpose hai solar system mein?

options.B: Multiple solar panel strings ko combine karna aur protection provide karna

questions.explanation: Junction box multiple solar panel strings ko combine karta hai aur overcurrent protection ke liye fuses ya circuit breakers provide karta hai.

questions.question: Mounting structure ka kya role hai solar PV system mein?

options.B: Solar panels ko secure aur optimal angle par hold karna
options.C: DC ko AC mein convert karna

questions.explanation: Mounting structure solar panels ko roof ya ground par secure karta hai aur unhe sahi tilt aur azimuth angle par rakhta hai maximum sunlight capture karne ke liye.

questions.question: Net Metering kya hai?

options.A: Solar panels ki efficiency measure karna
options.B: Grid-tied system mein generated aur consumed electricity ko track karna

questions.explanation: Net metering ek billing mechanism hai jo grid-tied solar system owners ko extra electricity jo woh grid ko supply karte hain, uska credit deta hai.

questions.question: Bypass diode ka kya kaam hai solar panel mein?

options.B: Current flow ki direction change karna
options.C: Shaded cells ko bypass karna taaki poore panel ki performance disturb na ho
options.D: Panel ko overcharge hone se bachana

questions.explanation: Bypass diodes shaded ya damaged cells ko bypass kar dete hain, jisse poore panel ya string ki performance par negative impact kam hota hai.

questions.question: Kaun sa battery type solar applications mein sabse common hai?

options.B: Lithium-ion

questions.explanation: Lead-acid batteries (flooded ya sealed) solar off-grid systems mein unki reliability aur cost-effectiveness ki wajah se sabse common hain.

questions.question: String sizing ka kya matlab hai solar system design mein?

options.B: Number of panels in series jo inverter ki voltage range mein fit hon
options.C: Battery bank ka size decide karna
options.D: Mounting structure ka size decide karna

questions.explanation: String sizing mein yeh determine kiya jaata hai ki kitne solar panels ko series mein connect kiya jaaye taaki combined voltage inverter ki operating voltage range ke andar rahe.

questions.question: DC Disconnect Switch ka kya use hai?

options.B: Solar panels aur inverter ke beech DC power ko safely disconnect karna

questions.explanation: DC Disconnect Switch ek safety device hai jo maintenance ya emergencies ke dauraan solar panels aur inverter ke beech DC current flow ko manually band karta hai.

questions.question: Solar site survey mein sabse pehle kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Roof ki condition, shading aur orientation

questions.explanation: Site survey mein roof ki structural integrity, shading ke sources aur sahi orientation (south direction) check karna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Solar panels install karte samay kya direction sabse achhi hoti hai India mein?

options.B: East

questions.explanation: India mein, solar panels ko South direction mein lagane se sabse zyada sunlight milti hai, jisse maximum energy generation hoti hai.

questions.question: Solar panels ko roof par mount karne ke liye kis tool ki zaroorat padegi?

options.B: Drill machine

questions.explanation: Drill machine ka use roof par holes karne aur mounting structure ko fix karne ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Wiring karte samay kis cheez ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye taaki loose connections na hon?

options.A: Wires ko tape se lapet dein
options.B: Tight aur secure connections banayein

questions.explanation: Loose connections se resistance badhta hai, power loss hota hai aur fire hazard ka risk bhi hota hai, isliye tight connections zaroori hain.

questions.question: Solar panel array ki earthing kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Panel ki efficiency badhane ke liye
options.B: Lightning aur electrical faults se protection ke liye
options.C: Panel ko thanda rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Earthing lightning strikes aur electrical faults se hone wale damage aur shocks se system aur logon ko protect karta hai.

questions.question: Inverter ko kahan install karna chahiye?

options.B: Ventilated, cool aur dry jagah par

questions.explanation: Inverter ko heat aur moisture se bachane ke liye ventilated, cool aur dry jagah par install karna chahiye, jisse uski efficiency aur life badhe.

questions.question: Solar panel tilt angle kis par depend karta hai?

options.B: Location ka latitude

questions.explanation: Solar panel ka optimal tilt angle installation location ke latitude par depend karta hai, jisse saal bhar maximum sunlight capture ho sake.

questions.question: MC4 connectors ka use kya hai solar wiring mein?

options.B: Waterproof aur secure electrical connections banana

questions.explanation: MC4 connectors specially designed hote hain solar applications ke liye jo waterproof aur reliable connections provide karte hain.

questions.question: Agar ek solar panel string mein shading ho, toh kya hoga?

options.A: Poori string ki output badh jayegi
options.B: Poori string ki output kam ho jayegi
options.C: Sirf shaded panel ki output kam hogi

questions.explanation: Series connection mein, agar ek panel shaded ho jaata hai, toh woh poori string ke current ko restrict kar deta hai, jisse overall output kam ho jaati hai.

questions.question: Conduit ka kya use hai electrical wiring mein?

options.B: Wires ko mechanical damage aur environmental factors se protect karna

questions.explanation: Conduit ek protective pipe hota hai jo electrical wires ko physical damage, moisture aur chemicals se bachata hai.

questions.question: Solar panels install karte samay roof par kitna gap maintain karna chahiye?

options.B: Proper ventilation ke liye thoda gap

questions.explanation: Solar panels ke neeche proper ventilation zaroori hai taaki woh cool rahein. Overheating se unki efficiency kam ho jaati hai.

questions.question: Voltage drop ko minimize karne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Lambe aur patle wires use karein
options.B: Chhote aur mote (thicker) wires use karein

questions.explanation: Chhote aur mote (thicker gauge) wires ka resistance kam hota hai, jisse voltage drop minimize hota hai aur power loss kam hota hai.

questions.question: Roof-mounted solar system install karte samay kis cheez ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye roof ki structural integrity ke liye?

options.A: Roof par extra weight add na karein
options.B: Sirf light weight panels use karein
options.C: Roof ki load-bearing capacity check karein

questions.explanation: Solar panels aur unki mounting structure ka weight roof ki load-bearing capacity ke andar hona chahiye, warna roof ko damage ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Solar array ko connect karne se pehle kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Open Circuit Voltage (Voc) aur Short Circuit Current (Isc)

questions.explanation: Connecting se pehle Voc aur Isc check karna zaroori hai taaki yeh confirm ho sake ki panels sahi voltage aur current produce kar rahe hain aur koi fault nahi hai.

questions.question: BOS (Balance of System) mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: Inverter, mounting structure, cables, and other electrical components

questions.explanation: BOS mein solar panels ko chhodkar system ke baaki saare components shamil hote hain, jaise inverter, cables, mounting structure, disconnects, etc.

questions.question: Solar panel installation mein cable management kyun important hai?

options.B: Safety, efficiency aur system ki longevity ke liye
options.C: Birds ko attract karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Proper cable management se loose connections, damage aur fire hazards ka risk kam hota hai, aur system ki efficiency aur life badhti hai.

questions.question: Solar system installation ke baad final step kya hota hai?

options.B: System ko test aur commission karna

questions.explanation: Installation ke baad system ko properly test aur commission karna zaroori hai taaki yeh confirm ho sake ki woh sahi tareeke se kaam kar raha hai aur saare safety standards follow kiye gaye hain.

questions.question: Solar panels ki regular cleaning kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Unka colour maintain karne ke liye
options.B: Dust aur dirt se hone wale power loss ko avoid karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Dust, dirt aur bird droppings solar panels par jama hokar sunlight absorption ko kam kar dete hain, jisse power output kam ho jaati hai.

questions.question: Solar panels ko saaf karne ka best time kya hai?

options.A: Dopahar mein jab dhoop tez ho
options.B: Subah jaldi ya shaam ko jab panels thande hon

questions.explanation: Panels ko subah jaldi ya shaam ko saaf karna chahiye jab woh thande hon, garam panels par paani dalne se thermal shock ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Agar solar system ki output kam ho rahi hai, toh pehla troubleshooting step kya hoga?

options.B: Panels par shading check karein

questions.explanation: Shading solar output kam hone ka sabse common reason hai, isliye pehle shading check karna chahiye.

questions.question: Inverter par red light blink kar rahi hai, iska kya matlab ho sakta hai?

options.B: Inverter update ho raha hai

questions.explanation: Inverter par red light ya error code usually kisi fault ya malfunction ko indicate karta hai, jise manual mein check karna chahiye.

questions.question: Solar system ki wires aur connections ko periodically check karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Loose connections, corrosion ya damage ko detect karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Loose connections ya damage se power loss, overheating aur fire hazards ho sakte hain, isliye regular checks zaroori hain.

questions.question: Battery-based solar system mein battery water level (agar applicable ho) kab check karna chahiye?

options.B: Har mahine ya company ke recommendation ke hisaab se

questions.explanation: Flooded lead-acid batteries mein electrolyte level ko regularly check karna aur distilled water add karna zaroori hai unki life aur performance ke liye.

questions.question: Solar panels ki visual inspection mein kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Cracks, hotspots, discoloration ya physical damage

questions.explanation: Cracks, hotspots ya discoloration panel ke damage ya malfunction ko indicate kar sakte hain, jisse output kam ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Agar inverter koi output nahi de raha hai, toh kya check karna chahiye?

options.A: Sirf inverter ko replace kar dein
options.B: AC aur DC disconnect switches ko check karein ki woh ON hain ya nahi
options.C: Ghar ki light off kar dein

questions.explanation: Sabse pehle AC aur DC disconnect switches ki position check karein, ho sakta hai woh OFF hon ya trip ho gaye hon.

questions.question: Solar panel ki efficiency kaise measure karte hain?

options.B: Uske temperature se
options.C: Output power (Watt) ko input solar radiation se compare karke

questions.explanation: Efficiency output electrical power aur input solar power (sunlight) ka ratio hota hai, jo percentage mein express kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Maintenance ke dauraan electrical shock se bachne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.B: PPE pehne aur system ko properly de-energize karein

questions.explanation: Safety ke liye, kisi bhi electrical component par kaam karne se pehle system ko de-energize karna aur PPE pehna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Solar system mein overcurrent protection ke liye kya use hota hai?

options.B: Resistors

questions.explanation: Fuses aur circuit breakers overcurrent ya short circuit conditions mein system ko protect karte hain.

questions.question: Agar ek solar panel hot spot dikha raha hai, toh iska kya matlab ho sakta hai?

options.B: Panel ka ek area overheat ho raha hai due to defect ya shading
options.D: Panel electricity generate nahi kar raha

questions.explanation: Hot spots panel mein localized overheating ko darshate hain, jo manufacturing defect, partial shading ya cell damage ki wajah se ho sakte hain aur panel ko permanently damage kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Solar system ki performance ko monitor karne ke liye kya use hota hai?

options.B: Thermometer

questions.explanation: Modern solar systems mein monitoring software ya inverters par display panel hote hain jo real-time performance data provide karte hain.

questions.question: Mounting structure ki integrity ko periodically check karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Uska colour change karne ke liye
options.B: Rust, corrosion ya loose bolts ko check karne ke liye
options.C: Usko aur mazboot banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Rust, corrosion ya loose bolts se structure weak ho sakti hai, jisse panels girne ka khatra ho sakta hai, isliye regular inspection zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar battery bank se acid smell aa rahi hai, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Ventilation check karein aur safety precautions ke saath inspect karein

questions.explanation: Acid smell battery ke overcharging ya damage ko indicate kar sakti hai, jo dangerous ho sakta hai. Proper ventilation aur safety gear ke saath inspect karna chahiye.

questions.question: Solar panels ko saaf karne ke liye kis type ke detergent ka use karna chahiye?

options.B: Abrasive cleaners

questions.explanation: Strong chemicals ya abrasive cleaners panels ki surface ko damage kar sakte hain. Mild soap aur soft cleaning tools ka use karna chahiye.

questions.question: Solar energy ka environmental benefit kya hai?

options.B: Air pollution kam karta hai

questions.explanation: Solar energy clean energy source hai, jo electricity generate karne mein carbon emissions aur air pollution ko kam karta hai.

questions.question: End-of-life solar panels ko kaise dispose karna chahiye?

options.B: Specialized recycling facilities mein

questions.explanation: Solar panels mein valuable aur potentially hazardous materials hote hain, isliye unhe specialized recycling facilities mein dispose karna chahiye.

questions.question: India mein solar energy ko promote karne ke liye government ki kaun si scheme hai?

options.B: Pradhan Mantri Suryodaya Yojana

questions.explanation: Pradhan Mantri Suryodaya Yojana residential rooftop solar installations ko promote karne ke liye ek major government initiative hai.

questions.question: Ek solar technician ke liye future career growth opportunities kya hain?

options.B: Design, project management aur advanced maintenance

questions.explanation: Ek experienced solar technician design, project management, advanced troubleshooting aur training jaise roles mein grow kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Solar technician ki job mein kaun si skill sabse important hai?

options.B: Electrical wiring aur troubleshooting

questions.explanation: Electrical wiring, component installation aur troubleshooting skills solar technician ke liye core competencies hain.

questions.question: Renewable energy sources ka kya fayda hai non-renewable sources ke muqable?

options.B: Kabhi khatam nahi hote aur environmentally friendly hote hain

questions.explanation: Renewable sources jaise solar aur wind energy naturally replenish hote hain aur fossil fuels ki tarah khatam nahi hote, aur kam pollution karte hain.

questions.question: Solar energy sector mein certification kyun important hai?

options.B: Competency aur safety standards ko validate karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Certification industry standards aur best practices ki knowledge aur skill ko validate karta hai, jo employers aur clients ke liye trust build karta hai.

questions.question: Solar energy ka greenhouse gas emissions par kya asar hota hai?

options.B: Kam karta hai

questions.explanation: Solar energy electricity generate karne mein greenhouse gas emissions ko significantly kam karta hai, kyuki ismein fossil fuels ka combustion nahi hota.

questions.question: Solar energy adoption se energy security kaise badhti hai?

options.A: Dusre deshon par dependency badh jaati hai
options.B: Local energy production badhti hai aur fuel imports kam hote hain
options.D: Energy prices unstable ho jaati hain

questions.explanation: Solar energy local level par generate hoti hai, jisse foreign fossil fuel imports par dependency kam hoti hai aur desh ki energy security badhti hai.

questions.question: Solar technician ki job mein kaun sa soft skill helpful hoga?

options.B: Teamwork aur communication

questions.explanation: Teamwork, clear communication aur problem-solving skills installation aur maintenance projects mein bahut zaroori hain.

questions.question: Solar energy sector mein growth ka kya karan hai?

options.B: Fossil fuels ki badhti prices aur environmental concerns

questions.explanation: Fossil fuels ki badhti prices, climate change ke baare mein awareness aur government support ne solar energy sector ki growth ko boost kiya hai.

questions.question: Solar manufacturing plants mein kaun se hazardous materials ka use hota hai?

options.B: Glass
options.C: Cadmium Telluride (CdTe) ya Lead (Pb) kuch panel types mein

questions.explanation: Kuch thin-film solar panels mein Cadmium Telluride ya Lead jaise hazardous materials ka use hota hai, jinhe proper handling aur disposal ki zaroorat hoti hai.

questions.question: Solar energy se local employment opportunities kaise badhti hain?

options.B: Installation, manufacturing, sales aur maintenance mein jobs create hote hain
options.C: Jobs sirf abroad mein create hote hain

questions.explanation: Solar industry mein installations, manufacturing, R&D, sales aur maintenance jaise various sectors mein local employment opportunities create hoti hain.

questions.question: Sustainable development mein solar energy ka kya yogdaan hai?

options.B: Clean energy provide karke environmental impact kam karta hai
options.D: Economic growth ko slow karta hai

questions.explanation: Solar energy clean energy provide karke environmental protection aur economic development ko support karta hai, jo sustainable development ke pillars hain.

questions.question: Solar energy sector mein ek technician ko continuous learning ki kya zaroorat hai?

options.B: Technology aur standards constantly evolve karte rehte hain

questions.explanation: Solar technology, installation methods aur safety standards lagatar evolve hote rehte hain, isliye technicians ko updated rehne ke liye continuous learning zaroori hai.

questions.question: Solar energy ke use se electricity bills par kya asar hota hai?

options.B: Kam ho jaate hain ya zero ho jaate hain

questions.explanation: Solar energy system install karne se ghar ki electricity demand grid se kam ho jaati hai, jisse electricity bills kam ho jaate hain aur zero bhi ho sakte hain.
